description: Particle physics frontiers - muon g-2, Higgs, neutrinos, BSM searches.

facts.truth: confirmed anomaly suggesting physics beyond SM
distractors: found perfect agreement with all Standard Model theoretical predictions
showed the muon has no anomalous magnetic moment contribution whatsoever
was too imprecise to distinguish between Standard Model and new physics

facts.context: The muon g-2 theory situation involves:
facts.truth: tension between lattice and dispersive predictions
distractors: complete theoretical consensus with no disagreements between calculations
theory predictions that exactly match the experimental measurement now
abandonment of theoretical calculations as fundamentally unreliable

facts.context: LHC measurements of Higgs self-coupling currently:
facts.truth: have large uncertainties but are SM-consistent
distractors: have precisely confirmed the Standard Model prediction with high accuracy
definitively rule out the Standard Model Higgs mechanism entirely
show the Higgs boson does not interact with itself at all

facts.truth: agrees with SM narrow width prediction
distractors: reveals the Higgs boson is significantly wider than Standard Model theoretical predictions indicating undiscovered decay channels
definitively proves the Higgs boson is perfectly stable and has zero probability of ever decaying into other particles
fundamentally cannot be measured by any experimental technique and remains completely unknown to physics permanently

facts.context: Current evidence on neutrino mass ordering:
facts.truth: slightly favors normal but remains uncertain
distractors: has definitively established the inverted mass hierarchy with certainty
proves all three neutrino masses are exactly equal to each other
shows neutrinos are completely massless as originally assumed

facts.truth: shows hints but not yet definitive discovery
distractors: has been definitively established at discovery-level significance already
has been completely ruled out by all neutrino experiments to date
is theoretically impossible in the neutrino sector of physics

facts.context: Direct dark matter detection experiments have:
facts.truth: set strong limits but no confirmed detection
distractors: definitively detected WIMP dark matter particles in multiple experiments
completely ruled out all possible dark matter candidates forever
found results that perfectly match background-only expectations always

facts.truth: excluded simple models but SUSY not ruled out
distractors: discovered superpartner particles confirming supersymmetry theory
completely and definitively ruled out all supersymmetric theories
found evidence strongly favoring minimal supersymmetric extensions

facts.truth: some tensions persist but significance varies
distractors: have all been resolved as statistical fluctuations with no anomalies
definitively prove the existence of new particles beyond the SM
cannot be measured reliably at current experimental facilities

facts.context: The CDF W boson mass measurement:
facts.truth: shows tension with SM but other experiments disagree
distractors: perfectly confirms the Standard Model prediction with high precision
has been replicated by all other experiments showing same deviation
proves the W boson does not exist as a fundamental particle

facts.truth: precision Higgs and rare process measurements
distractors: only searching for supersymmetric particles and nothing else
shutting down because all physics has already been discovered
reducing collision energy to study lower energy phenomena

facts.context: The DUNE experiment will primarily measure:
facts.truth: CP violation and mass ordering in neutrinos
distractors: Higgs boson properties using neutrino beams directly
dark matter interactions in underground detectors only
proton decay as the sole physics objective
